---
title: "Blocking & Cross-ART Risk"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML

_candidates = [Path("data/blocking.json"), Path("../data/blocking.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/blocking.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report blocking"
    )

d       = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group   = d["group"]
summary = d["summary"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
""")
```

## Summary

```{python}
s = summary
html = '<table class="table table-sm table-striped" style="max-width:480px"><thead><tr><th>Metric</th><th>Count</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
html += f"<tr><td>Directly blocked epics</td><td><strong>{s['total_blocked']}</strong></td></tr>"
html += f"<tr><td>Total blocking relationships</td><td><strong>{s['total_relationships']}</strong></td></tr>"
html += f"<tr><td>Portfolio Epics with blocked descendants</td><td><strong>{s['total_portfolio_risk']}</strong></td></tr>"
html += f"<tr><td>Cross-ART dependencies (within VS)</td><td><strong>{s['total_cross_art']}</strong></td></tr>"
html += "</tbody></table>"
HTML(html)
```

## Portfolio-Level Risk

```{python}
portfolio_risk = d["portfolio_risk"]
if not portfolio_risk:
    HTML("<p>✅ No Portfolio Epics contain blocked descendants.</p>")
else:
    html = "<p>Top-level Epics that contain one or more blocked descendants:</p>"
    html += '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr><th>Epic</th><th>Blocked Descendants</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
    for row in portfolio_risk:
        elink = f'<a href="{row["url"]}" target="_blank">⚠️ 🏆 {row["title"]}</a>' if row["url"] else f'⚠️ 🏆 {row["title"]}'
        desc_links = ", ".join(
            f'<a href="{d["url"]}" target="_blank">{d["icon"]} {d["title"]}</a>' if d["url"] else f'{d["icon"]} {d["title"]}'
            for d in row["blocked_descendants"]
        )
        html += f"<tr><td>{elink}</td><td><strong>{len(row['blocked_descendants'])}:</strong> {desc_links}</td></tr>"
    html += "</tbody></table>"
    HTML(html)
```

## Cross-ART Risk by Value Stream

```{python}
vs_cross_art = d["vs_cross_art"]
has_deps = any(vs["deps"] for vs in vs_cross_art)
if not has_deps:
    HTML("<p>✅ No cross-ART dependencies found.</p>")
else:
    html = "<p>Blocking relationships where an epic in one ART is blocked by an epic from a different ART within the same Value Stream.</p>"
    for vs in vs_cross_art:
        if not vs["deps"]:
            continue
        html += f"<h3>🔷 {vs['vs_name']}</h3>"
        html += '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr>'
        html += "<th>Blocked Epic</th><th>Blocked ART</th><th>PI</th><th>Blocker Epic</th><th>Blocker ART</th>"
        html += "</tr></thead><tbody>"
        for dep in vs["deps"]:
            bl_link = f'<a href="{dep["blocked_url"]}" target="_blank">{dep["blocked_title"]}</a>' if dep["blocked_url"] else dep["blocked_title"]
            bk_link = f'<a href="{dep["blocker_url"]}" target="_blank">{dep["blocker_title"]}</a>' if dep["blocker_url"] else dep["blocker_title"]
            html += f"<tr><td>{bl_link}</td><td>{dep['blocked_art']}</td><td>{dep['blocked_piid']}</td><td>{bk_link}</td><td>{dep['blocker_art']}</td></tr>"
        html += "</tbody></table>"
    HTML(html)
```

## Blocked Items Detail

```{python}
blocked_items = d["blocked_items"]
if not blocked_items:
    HTML("<p>✅ No blocked epics found.</p>")
else:
    html = ""
    for item in blocked_items:
        elink = f'<a href="{item["url"]}" target="_blank">{item["icon"]} {item["title"]}</a>' if item["url"] else f'{item["icon"]} {item["title"]}'
        html += f'<details style="margin-bottom:8px"><summary>⛔ {elink} &nbsp;—&nbsp; State: {item["state"]} &nbsp;—&nbsp; Blocked by: {len(item["blockers"])}</summary>'
        html += "<div style='padding:8px 16px'>"
        for b in item["blockers"]:
            blink = f'<a href="{b["url"]}" target="_blank">{b["icon"]} {b["title"]}</a>' if b["url"] else f'{b["icon"]} {b["title"]}'
            html += f"<p>🔒 <strong>{blink}</strong></p>"
        if item["ancestors"]:
            html += "<p><strong>Risk propagates up to:</strong></p>"
            for a in item["ancestors"]:
                alink = f'<a href="{a["url"]}" target="_blank">{a["icon"]} {a["title"]}</a>' if a["url"] else f'{a["icon"]} {a["title"]}'
                html += f"<p>⬆️ <strong>{alink}</strong></p>"
        html += "</div></details>"
    HTML(html)
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

| Icon | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| ⛔ | Blocked — has at least one active blocker |
| 🔒 | Blocker — directly blocking one or more epics |
| ⬆️ | Risk propagation — blocked descendant risk bubbles up to a Portfolio Epic |
| ⚠️ | Portfolio risk flag — top-level Epic has blocked descendants |
:::
